title: The idiots smp ADDONS
description: A chaotic, lightweight modpack built for laughs, visuals, and smoother gameplay. Designed for players who want to keep the vanilla feel but spice it up with animated UIs, talking mobs, capes, and cinematic third-person views
body:
![l](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2836a73aa2e9c263b780dfdfa0ef3cb4859a92b3.jpeg)

![f](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9af61c831897fd61cd5ce292bcd0f0a5c339cda1.png)

“Zero Braincells, Maximum Fun.”

## 🔥 What’s Inside?

🎤 Talking Mobs (Yes, really)
Villagers now flap their mouths when they talk.
Players too. It’s cursed. It’s amazing.
(Screaming encouraged — add voice chat for full chaos.)

## 🎮 Freecam Third-Person Mode
Move your camera like it’s a cinematic trailer.
Spin around. Strike a pose. Be fabulous.

## 💬 Chat That Doesn’t Suck

Animated chat messages

Player face icons

It’s like Discord in your hotbar

## 🧣 Capes for Everyone
Minecon? Never heard of it. You get a cape. Just because.

## 🖼️ Animated Logo & Blur
The title screen moves. Menus blur.
This ain’t 2012 Minecraft anymore.

## 🧠 FPS Boosts (Because You’ll Need Them)
Lithium, FerriteCore, EntityCulling — all the smart performance mods
so your PC doesn’t explode from the dumb ones.

## ✨ Optional: Add Voice Chat

Want to yell “CREEPER!!” and actually be heard?
Drop in Simple Voice Chat and let the mic chaos begin.

# 🚀 Who’s This For?

People who want fun, funny, fast Minecraft

Builders, explorers, or meme lords

Multiplayer friends who scream a lot
